purpose: Default delegation table. execution_plan.md must either adopt each default-delegate slice below or explicitly justify keeping it serial. The execution-plan gate checks this file, so editing it changes what every future run must plan for.

slices.note: One clean-context subagent creates the whole planning package. Proven pattern from 2026-07-03.
Category-tree traversal and candidate-ledger recovery can be split by category and run in parallel.
One clean-context style selector does candidate lookup and comparison only. Prevents the main agent from skipping the style space.
Character-card expansion and repair split by character batch. This was the largest serial time sink in the 2026-07-03 run.
Cover generation and repair split by asset batch, polled in the background.
Clean-context adversarial verifiers for stage acceptance. Sub reports are not evidence until the main builder re-runs decisive checks.
Owner-auth browser actions conflict if parallelized. Keep serial on the local orchestrator.
Main-builder synthesis and final acceptance stay serial by contract.
